title: DePhoegons' Chocobos
body:
Chocobos for DePhoegons' Reclaim
-1.18.2
-1.19.2
-1.19.3
-1.20 / 1.20.1  -  [ Patchouli, not-currently available for 1.20+ ] -------------------------------- DePhoegons' Chocobos
- [CurseForge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dephoegons-chocobos)
- Modrinth BaDePhoegons' Reclaim
- [CurseForge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dephoegons-reclaim)
- Modrinth   Warning*
-  This is a completely separate fork from 'ChocoCraft 4'
- this one was developed from a very old & buggy version 1.18.1 (before any 1.18.2 or 1.19 work was done by that time, very talented work) & has taken a different approach on how chocobos should or shouldn't be.
== Technically the mods are compatible but would spawn confusion & lead to sometimes conflicting moments. Version Log Details(Upcoming)
- Combat Able Companions
- Chocobos can get stronger through breeding.
- Variously Sized Chocobos Exist
- Rideable Chocobos
   Chocobos, Chicobos, & Choco armor will share color palettes of Certain blocks.
-lapis
-Emerald
-Birch
-Redstone
-Crimson stem
- Gold
- Yellow Coral
- (Hanging flower - pink)
- Purple Coral
- Coal
Chocobos
-----------
All colors but one colors naturally spawn (biome dependent)
-- Yes, the colored spawn eggs are purposefully changed to not work with spawners. Chocobos are Namable via Nametag
-Can also be Named by Renaming the Chocobo Egg or Spawn Egg Multiplayer Notes.
--------------
Should work perfectly fine.
Chocobo you are riding (while in first person) will not render for you but does for other people as you ride it.
-very intentional. Decencies Note
-----------------
DePhoegons' Reclaim
  - Uses the Patchouli book from here for information. Chocopedia Notes
---------------
Removed
-- Replaced with ||  DePhoegons' Isle || Book, that handles base mod & chocobo information. { Patchouli Book } To Identify Chocobos. 1. Health is visible while riding
2. Speed is noticeable while riding.
3. Gender is visible on the collar. (tamed)
4. while riding the command = /DelChoco Chocobo RiddenChocoboStats
--- Will display the following.
-HP,
-Armor,
-Movement Speed,
-Max Stamina
-Attack Damage
